headline: 5 Revealing Analyst Questions From Intuitive Surgical’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Intuitive Surgical’s first quarter results for 2026 exceeded Wall Street’s expectations, with management crediting the outcome to strong global procedure growth and expansion of the da Vinci and Ion platforms. CEO David Rosa pointed to a 17% increase in total procedures, including “broad-based adoption across da Vinci and Ion as customers continue to advance minimally invasive care.” The company also highlighted notable gains in after-hours and non-urology procedures, as well as expanding uptake

headline: How Strong Q1 2026 Results and Completed Buyback Will Impact Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) Investors
summary: Intuitive Surgical recently reported past first-quarter 2026 results showing revenue of US$2,770.8 million and net income of US$821.5 million, alongside completing a multi-year buyback of 29,440,210 shares for US$9.08 billion. The combination of higher earnings per share and a reduced share count from the long-running repurchase program highlights management’s focus on reinforcing shareholder value through both operating performance and capital allocation. We’ll now examine how this stronger...

headline: Medical Robotics Market Size to Grow USD 102.75 Billion by 2035 | Research by SNS Insider
summary: The United States medical robotics market was estimated to be worth USD 9.87 billion in 2025 and is projected to increase at 16.00% CAGR from 2026 to 2035, reaching USD 43.16 billion. headline: Intuitive Surgical Inc (NASDAQ:ISRG) Screens as a Strong Growth Stock with a Promising Technical Breakout Setup
summary: Intuitive Surgical (ISRG) shows strong growth and financial health with a top-tier technical setup near resistance, signaling a potential breakout opportunity for investors.
